title: Cron Transition Policy — Phase 31 Stays Primary
rule: Phase 32 does NOT replace Phase 31 cron until ALL gates are met.

phase_31_cron.actions: Monitor only — pull GSC data, check link regression, report movement
phase_31_cron.remains_active_until: Phase 32.1 batch is APPROVED and PROVEN

allowed_actions: Generate candidate pages (quality scored, doorway audited)
prohibited_actions: Deploy new long-tail pages to production

gate_1_batch1_approved.description: Batch 1 (15-25 pages) passes all quality gates (90+), doorway audit (SAFE), and Auditor pre-approval

gate_2_no_broken_links.description: 0 broken internal links confirmed by verify-internal-links.js

gate_3_no_build_failures.description: Build succeeds with new pages integrated. Vercel deploys cleanly.
gate_3_no_build_failures.status: NOT TESTED — no new pages built yet

gate_4_phase31_day7_measurement.description: Phase 31 affected pages have at least 7 days of measurement (Jun 24 earliest)
gate_4_phase31_day7_measurement.status: NOT MET — Day 1 of measurement (Jun 17). Day 7 = Jun 24.

gate_5_batch1_quality_proven.description: First batch of pages passes all quality gates (scoring, doorway, pre-approval, deploy verification)
gate_5_batch1_quality_proven.status: NOT MET — pages not yet built to 90+ standard

transition_timeline_realistic: Jun 25-28 (allowing time for batch 1 build + review)
do_not_rush: Cron transition is a safety gate, not a calendar target. Missing gates = stay in Phase 31 SAFE_RECOVERY.
